funcbody:
func parseDatadogAddress(address string) (string, string) {
	network := "udp"

	var addr string
	switch {
	case strings.HasPrefix(address, unixAddressPrefix):
		network = "unix"
		addr = address[len(unixAddressPrefix):]
	case address != "":
		addr = address
	default:
		addr = "localhost:8125"
	}

	return network, addr
}
